warnings: Debug readiness reflects artifact-backed evidence only. Where evidence is partial, debug_readiness is 'partial' rather than 'sufficient'.
next_recommended_input is an MET recommendation; canonical owners adopt or reject through their own governed flows.
failure_prevented: A new engineer needing more than 15 minutes to answer what failed, why, where in the loop, what evidence proves it, and what to feed in next; recommendations being made without a source.
signal_improved: One operator-facing index walks failure → evidence → candidate → next recommended input with debug_readiness per entry; unknowns are explicit, not silently absent.

explanation_entries.what_failed: EVL eval coverage_status reads partial; long_horizon and certification dimensions are not enumerated.
explanation_entries.why: Downstream certification readiness depends on EVL coverage being explicit per-dimension; a partial signal makes downstream gates ambiguous.
explanation_entries.next_recommended_input: Forward EVC-EVL-LONG-HORIZON-REPLAY and EVC-EVL-FULL-CERT-SET to EVL; pair REP hardening item HR-REP-DIM-LONG-HORIZON.
unknowns: Whether EVL plans to surface per-dimension status in the next loop
explanation_entries.failure_prevented: Operator chasing partial coverage state across multiple artifacts.
explanation_entries.signal_improved: Single explanation entry walks from failure to next input.

explanation_entries.what_failed: REP replay_record exposes only short_horizon; long_horizon and distribution_shift dimensions are absent.
explanation_entries.why: Replay coverage cannot be declared full without the long-horizon dimension; downstream lineage edge per-dimension status is missing.
explanation_entries.next_recommended_input: Forward EVC-REP-LONG-HORIZON and HR-REP-DIM-LONG-HORIZON to EVL/REP.
explanation_entries.failure_prevented: REP per-dimension gap requiring multi-artifact lookup.
explanation_entries.signal_improved: Per-dimension gap surfaces with related candidates and next recommended input.

explanation_entries.what_failed: LIN lineage_record does not expose the eval_summary -> certification_evidence edge per-edge status.
explanation_entries.why: Without the certification edge, replay cannot answer which certification input is missing; SEL observe-only posture is harder to disambiguate.
explanation_entries.next_recommended_input: Forward EVC-LIN-TRACE-COMPLETENESS and HR-LIN-CERT-EDGE to EVL/LIN.
explanation_entries.failure_prevented: Cert-edge gap requiring trace through multiple artifacts to reach the next input.
explanation_entries.signal_improved: Single index entry names the gap, evidence, and next input.

explanation_entries.what_failed: No canonical override log exists; override_evidence_count is unknown.
explanation_entries.why: Without an audit log, downstream MET signals cannot reference override history; CDE override-evidence boundary is unobservable.
unknowns: Whether any overrides occurred — currently unknown, not zero
explanation_entries.failure_prevented: Override absence being inferred from partial reads.
explanation_entries.signal_improved: Index entry names the gap and explicitly flags the unknown.

explanation_entries.what_failed: SEL enforcement_action_record reads observe_only without a first-class compliance_posture field.
explanation_entries.why: Observe-only-by-policy and observe-only-by-missing-evidence are indistinguishable from free text alone.
explanation_entries.next_recommended_input: Forward SCS-OBSERVE-ONLY-CLARIFY-001 and POL-SEL-CERT-COMPLETENESS to SEL.
unknowns: SEL timeline for first-class compliance_posture field
explanation_entries.failure_prevented: Observe-only state being mis-read as passivity.
explanation_entries.signal_improved: Index entry names the gap, evidence, and next input.
